positive: A stylized, vibrant maximalist illustration featuring a whimsical blend of elements: floating pastel jellyfish, geometric celestial bodies (moons and stars), and stylized deep-sea flora. The composition is a dense, swirling arrangement forming a beautiful mandala pattern, suggesting both cosmic depth and aquatic serenity. Use a limited color palette of lavender, aqua, gold foil effect accents, and deep indigo, emphasizing high contrast silhouettes against a slightly textured background. The style should be a mix of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern Memphis Group geometric shapes, suitable for direct, high-resolution textile printing. Perfect for a central, repeatable print motif.
